programmes.show_description: Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
After a week in which peace in the Middle East has yet to be secured, Sean Farrington examines the economic fallout with our regular panel of experts.
Steffan Powell and Rima Ahmed present with unique stories from across the UK, explaining details behind the headlines, and the biggest news and sport.
Tony Livesey takes your calls on the day's talking points, hearing views and experiences from across the UK. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines).
Adrian Chiles gets you set for the weekend with a good-humoured look at the latest news, sport and entertainment. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
It's a big/normal day! Everything in Elis and John world just got bigger/stayed exactly the same as before! All praise the Brave New World/status quo!
Qasa Alom brings you big political guests, the key news of the day, and your views on the issues that matter to you. Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
A round-up of the day's top news and sport with Chris Warburton and Sarah Mulkerrins. Plus interviews with people at the centre of the stories, and regular travel updates.
Mark Chapman is live from Augusta with the latest news and analysis from this year's Masters Tournament, plus updates on West Ham v Wolves in the Premier League.
The day's main news stories, topical debate and interviews. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Email: nolan@bbc.co.uk.
Laura McGhie with your calls and features through the night. Call 08085 909693 (calls are free from mobiles and landlines). Text 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Discussion, analysis and the latest news from big fight nights and the world of boxing with Steve Bunce.
John Murray, Ian Dennis and Alistair Bruce-Ball lift the lid on life as 5 Live commentators.
The big news and sports stories, weather, plus previews of the weekend's sport with Eleanor Oldroyd and Jeanette Kwakye. Text: 85058 (charged at your standard message rate).
Join Paddy, his listeners and great guests for the ultimate feel good start to the weekend.
Rick Edwards presents a hilarious look at the world of sport where guests compete with their sporting punditry.
Steve Crossman is joined by Alan Shearer, Leon Osman and Statman Dave to build up to today's sporting action, with updates on Arsenal v Bournemouth.
Live Premier League commentary of Brentford v Everton with updates from across today's 3pm matches in the Premier League, EFL and the Scottish Premiership.
Live horse racing coverage of the 2026 Grand National at Aintree.
Reports, results and reaction to the day's big sports stories.
Live football commentary of Liverpool v Fulham in the Premier League.
Your football calls with Aaron Paul and Chris Sutton. Phone 08085 909693 free from mobiles and landlines. Text 85058 at your standard message rate.
Mark Chapman presents live golf commentary from the third round of The Masters at Augusta National Golf Club.
